ns0:entry.ns0:title: Ed1s0nZ/CyberStrikeAI
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Ed1s0nZ/CyberStrikeAI
Language: go
CyberStrikeAI is an AI-native security testing platform built in Go. It integrates 100+ security tools, an intelligent orchestration engine, role-based testing with predefined security roles, a skills system with specialized testing skills, and comprehensive lifecycle management capabilities.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: VictoriaMetrics/VictoriaLogs
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/VictoriaMetrics/VictoriaLogs
Language: go
Fast and easy to use database for logs, which can efficiently handle terabytes of logs

ns0:entry.ns0:title: aquasecurity/trivy
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/aquasecurity/trivy
Language: go
Find vulnerabilities, misconfigurations, secrets, SBOM in containers, Kubernetes, code repositories, clouds and more

ns0:entry.ns0:title: bufbuild/buf
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/bufbuild/buf
Language: go
The best way of working with Protocol Buffers.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: canopy-network/canopy
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/canopy-network/canopy
Language: go
The official go implementation of the Canopy Network protocol

ns0:entry.ns0:title: containerd/containerd
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/containerd/containerd
Language: go
An open and reliable container runtime

ns0:entry.ns0:title: danielmiessler/Fabric
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/danielmiessler/Fabric
Language: go
Fabric is an open-source framework for augmenting humans using AI. It provides a modular system for solving specific problems using a crowdsourced set of AI prompts that can be used anywhere.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: gitleaks/gitleaks
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/gitleaks/gitleaks
Language: go
Find secrets with Gitleaks 🔑

ns0:entry.ns0:title: hashicorp/terraform-provider-aws
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/hashicorp/terraform-provider-aws
Language: go
The AWS Provider enables Terraform to manage AWS resources.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: korotovsky/slack-mcp-server
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/korotovsky/slack-mcp-server
Language: go
The most powerful MCP Slack Server with no permission requirements, Apps support, GovSlack, DMs, Group DMs and smart history fetch logic.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: livekit/livekit
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/livekit/livekit
Language: go
End-to-end realtime stack for connecting humans and AI

ns0:entry.ns0:title: matlab/matlab-mcp-core-server
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/matlab/matlab-mcp-core-server
Language: go
Run MATLAB® using AI applications with the official MATLAB MCP Server from MathWorks®. This MCP server for MATLAB supports a wide range of coding agents like Claude Code® and Visual Studio® Code.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: mudler/LocalAI
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/mudler/LocalAI
Language: go
🤖 The free, Open Source alternative to OpenAI, Claude and others. Self-hosted and local-first. Drop-in replacement, running on consumer-grade hardware. No GPU required. Runs gguf, transformers, diffusers and many more. Features: Generate Text, MCP, Audio, Video, Images, Voice Cloning, Distributed, P2P and decentralized inference

ns0:entry.ns0:title: open-telemetry/opentelemetry-collector
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/open-telemetry/opentelemetry-collector
Language: go
OpenTelemetry Collector

ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/projectcalico/calico
Language: go
Cloud native networking and network security

ns0:entry.ns0:title: projectdiscovery/katana
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/projectdiscovery/katana
Language: go
A next-generation crawling and spidering framework.

ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/sqlc-dev/sqlc
Language: go
Generate type-safe code from SQL

Language: go
